name: graphql-mcp
description: Generic read-only GraphQL MCP server — schema discovery, query execution, error typing, federation ownership

tools.name: query
tools.description: Execute a GraphQL query and return typed result with error classification

tools.name: raw
tools.description: Send an arbitrary GraphQL POST body and return typed result

tools.name: introspect
tools.description: Return a summary of Query fields and types from the active schema

tools.name: describe_type
tools.description: Return field/arg details for a named type, with federation subgraph if available

tools.name: list_subgraphs
tools.description: Return subgraph metadata parsed from supergraph SDL

tools.name: refresh_schema
tools.description: Clear schema cache, forcing next access to re-fetch
